verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Some say it's myth and legend One more book upon the shelf But the message it contains cannot be stilled For God who wrote Its pages Will not let it pass away Not one syllable will linger unfulfilled

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: His Word will stand, His Word will stand Though stars should fall And mountains turn to sand Though no man believes Him Still God's Word is true His promise is sure His love will endure And forever His Word will stand

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Don't listen to the voices Of the world caught up in fear For the word of God proclaims the victory He gives His children courage to confront the gates of hell With the sword that conquers every enemy
